urgency_banner.message: AWS Mandatory Migration Deadline: June 30, 2026. All AWS Marketplace sellers must be fully migrated to Partner Center 3.0 before this date. Missing the deadline risks disruption to your Marketplace listings and revenue. g/d/n/a can get you there — at no cost — before the clock runs out.

hero_banner.heading: Your AWS Marketplace Partner Center 3.0 Migration — Done RIGHT For You, For Free, In Under 30 Minutes of Your Time.
hero_banner.body_text: If you sell on AWS Marketplace, you need to migrate to Partner Center 3.0 before June 30, 2026. Most migrations fail because teams only think about moving data — not what happens after. g/d/n/a's cloud consulting team handles the entire lifecycle: the migration, the validation, and the workflows that keep you compliant long after go-live. No cost. No engineering lift.

stats.description: Complete migration delivered at zero cost to your organization.
We handle everything. Your engineers contribute less than 30 minutes total.
Don't risk your Marketplace listings. Get migrated well before the cutoff.

pain_points.heading: Getting migrated is only half the job. The failures happen after go-live.

problems.title: No process for adding new employees to roles
problems.description: New hires get skipped or added inconsistently — creating access gaps and audit risk.

problems.title: No process for removing departed employees
problems.description: Former employees retaining Marketplace access is a direct SOC2 violation — and the most common post-migration oversight.

pain_points.solution_title: g/d/n/a plans for everything — including what happens after day one.
pain_points.solution_description: We build employee lifecycle workflows in from the start so your environment stays compliant and audit-ready.

left_items.title: Expert Cloud Architecture — Not a SaaS Tool
left_items.description: Our team performs cloud architecture engagements every day. We bring AWS pillar expertise — security, reliability, cost, operations — that generic migration tools simply don't have.

left_items.title: Fully Managed Migration
left_items.description: We drive the entire process. You provide minimal input where only you can — we handle the rest, keeping your engineering team's involvement under 30 minutes.

left_items.title: Validated & Confirmed Live
left_items.description: We don't hand off until your Partner Center 3.0 environment is verified, tested, and confirmed operational before the June 30th deadline.

right_items.title: 30-Minute Intake Call
right_items.description: We learn your current Marketplace setup. No prep needed — just show up.

right_items.title: g/d/n/a Executes the Migration
right_items.description: Our team does the work. You're on standby for brief approvals only where required.

right_items.title: Validation & Sign-Off
right_items.description: We confirm everything is live, correct, and Partner Center 3.0 compliant.

right_items.title: Optional: Compliance Workflows
right_items.description: Add SOC2-aligned employee onboarding/offboarding workflows at no extra cost.

highlight_banner.heading: Stay SOC2 compliant through and after your migration
highlight_banner.body_content: Migrating to Partner Center 3.0 is an opportunity to close a frequently overlooked SOC2 control gap. g/d/n/a offers automated workflows for employee onboarding and offboarding — ensuring every resource change in Partner Center 3.0 is tracked, documented, and audit-ready. If you have an active SOC2 program or an upcoming audit, this add-on gives you the paper trail you need at no additional cost.

items.text: We do cloud every day. Our consulting practice runs AWS architecture engagements continuously — we're not a SaaS product that set-and-forgot its AWS knowledge.
Zero cost, zero obligation. This isn't a loss-leader with hidden fees. The migration is free, start to finish, with no contract required.
Under 30 minutes of your time. We've built a process that respects your team's bandwidth. You won't be pulled into a months-long project.
Compliance-ready from day one. Optional SOC2 workflows mean your migration leaves you better governed than before — not just migrated.

cta_section.heading: Don't Wait — June 30, 2026 Is Closer Than It Looks.
cta_section.description: Schedule your intake call today. Migration slots are limited and the AWS deadline is firm. There's no cost, no commitment, and no reason to wait.
